commands: five serialized Debian 12 Node 20 candidate commands
validation.summary: Linux core 5/5, stdio 6/6, bundle 3/3, recovery 5/5, and takeover 1/1 pass. Five Linux cells and all 15 OS cells validate by digest with no diagnostics.

review.evidence: Windows and Debian Linux pass independently; macOS remains explicitly blocked. No OS result fills another OS cell.

obligation_evidence.evidence: Exact Debian 12 cells cover lifecycle, refusal, stdio, recovery/no-replay, clean/adoption, bundle, and takeover behavior.
The PB-001 join retains five blocked macOS cells and separate Windows/Linux evidence without roll-up.

recovery: The minimal Node image lacked lsof/ss/netstat; retained the initial 4/5 failure, installed iproute2=6.1.0-3 in the temporary container, and reran the original core cell to 5/5.
